title: トレードさせていただきますっ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out shopping on a day off when I come across
a group in a stir about something.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Three whole boxes and we still haven't got one...
Urk! My stomach can't take any more...

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
King! Let's give up finding it ourselves! Any more
and we're likely to get sugar poisoning!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gasp... I wouldn't dare make you suffer that for me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
All right... Digital, I've decided to take you up on
that trade you offered.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hweee! Thank you so kindly for accepting! Or I
mean, I'm really sorry to have bothered you out
of nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
No, no, you're actually helping us out. No matter
how much we eat, we just can't find King's card.
We're at the end of our rope.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-i-is that so? Well, I'm used to eating tons of
chocolate, so just leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When you buy mountains of chocolate like I do,
you get tons of duplicates. I'm sure I'll get a few
of King!
choice_data_list: What are you guys talking about?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Trainer! Hehe, we're talking about
Umamusume chocolate eggs! King and her friends
came here to buy some too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume chocolate eggs... Oh, it must be
those egg-shaped chocolates that come with an
Umamusume figure inside.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I gave them permission to use my likeness
in the latest series!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A-a-about that, King! I'll check which ones I get
right away and then message you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, wheeze! I can't believe I get to actually do something useful for my oshi!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Today's gonna be the unboxing of the century!
No holds barred! I'll order twenty ten-egg boxes
and bust all of 'em open at once!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Guehehe... Drool... Looking at all the wonderful figures as I eat, this chocolate's gonna taste diviiine... ♪
choice_data_list: Try not to eat too much, okay?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hm, you're right! Putting on too much weight will
interfere with my sacred races...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep a number of chocolates aside and eat
them in moderation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm normally happy with whoever I get, but just
this time, I'm hoping for lots and lots of Kings. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital rushes home with an armful
of chocolate egg boxes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Can do! I just gotta sort out some drinks that go
well with chocolate now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Guehehe! Tonight, I feast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital heads home gasping in
anticipation.
